name: Varun Hemachandran
body:
Varun is a systems thinker and civic technologist working at the intersection of courts, AI, and the people caught between them. A Senior Curator at PUCAR, he previously co-led OpenNyAI, the collaborative mission building AI public goods for justice in India, and has curated communities at Agami since 2020.

Earlier he founded Talking Earth, a civic-data project crowdsourcing tree censuses in Bengaluru, and led business at The Bohemian House. He writes at seldoncrisis.blog.
